redis.clients.jedis.commands

Interface JedisBinaryCommands

  • All Superinterfaces:
    FunctionBinaryCommands, GeoBinaryCommands, HashBinaryCommands, HyperLogLogBinaryCommands, KeyBinaryCommands, ListBinaryCommands, ScriptingKeyBinaryCommands, SetBinaryCommands, SortedSetBinaryCommands, StreamBinaryCommands, StringBinaryCommands
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    Jedis, JedisCluster, JedisPooled, JedisSharding, UnifiedJedis

    public interface JedisBinaryCommands
extends KeyBinaryCommands, StringBinaryCommands, ListBinaryCommands, HashBinaryCommands, SetBinaryCommands, SortedSetBinaryCommands, GeoBinaryCommands, HyperLogLogBinaryCommands, StreamBinaryCommands, ScriptingKeyBinaryCommands, FunctionBinaryCommands
